_meta.doc: CRAFTING / FORGE (consumes materials from loot). UPGRADE raises a gear instance's item-level (ilvl) by 1 — cost scales with the current ilvl and uses the slot's signature material + Credits. RECIPES forge a fresh base gear piece from materials. Pure logic in src/systems/crafting.js; UI in src/ui/forge.js (opened by the `forge` event command at the Dawnhearth Forge). Materials come from data/systems/loot.json.
